{"creates":[{"slug":"mmlu","title":"MMLU","category":"ENTITY","body":"MMLU (Massive Multitask Language Understanding) 是 Hendrycks 等人于 2020 年提出的跨学科选择题基准，覆盖 57 个学科约 14000 道题。

## 应用

通常作为大模型通用知识水平的第一参考指标。

## 局限

题目泄漏风险高，社区已推出 MMLU-Pro 等更新版本。","oneLiner":"覆盖 57 个学科的跨学科选择题基准。","sources":[{"documentId":"doc-zh-tech","spanStart":120,"spanEnd":420,"quote":"MMLU 全称 Massive Multitask Language Understanding，由 Hendrycks 等人于 2020 年提出"}]},{"slug":"humaneval","title":"HumanEval","category":"ENTITY","body":"HumanEval 是 OpenAI 于 2021 年提出的 164 道手写 Python 编程题基准，评估指标为 pass@k。Claude 3.5 Sonnet 在 pass@1 上突破 92%。","oneLiner":"OpenAI 提出的 164 道 Python 编程题基准。","sources":[{"documentId":"doc-zh-tech","spanStart":900,"spanEnd":1100,"quote":"HumanEval 由 OpenAI 于 2021 年提出，包含 164 道手写的 Python 编程题目"}]},{"slug":"llm-as-judge","title":"LLM-as-Judge","category":"CONCEPT","body":"LLM-as-Judge 是让能力更强的模型扮演评委对候选输出按 rubric 评分的范式。

## 优势

解决 BLEU/ROUGE 对语义改写不敏感的痛点，覆盖创意写作、对话连贯性等难量化维度。代表性框架 MT-Bench、AlpacaEval、Arena-Hard。

## 风险

位置偏见、长度偏见、自我偏好偏见，建议异家族评委或多评委集成投票。","oneLiner":"LLM-as-Judge 是一种让能力更强的模型 (如 GPT-4 或 Claude Opus) 扮演评委角色按指定 rubric 对候选输出给出胜负或评分的语义评估范式，它解决了 BLEU 与 ROUGE 对语义改写不敏感的核心痛点，能够覆盖创意写作、对话连贯性、安全合规、风格一致性等难以用传统自动指标量化的开放维度，但需要警惕位置偏见、长度偏见、家族偏好与自我偏好偏见，建议采用异家族评委或多评委集成投票以提高结果稳健性，并配合双盲交换位置、控制长度上限、屏蔽模型名等手段缓解偏差，这一点在工程实践与学术评估中都至关重要，是现代评估流程不可或缺的关键一环。","sources":[{"documentId":"doc-zh-tech","spanStart":2400,"spanEnd":2700,"quote":"LLM-as-Judge 是近年兴起的范式，让一个能力更强的模型扮演评委角色"}]}],"updates":[],"deletes":[]}

creates.title: MMLU
creates.body:
MMLU (Massive Multitask Language Understanding) 是 Hendrycks 等人于 2020 年提出的跨学科选择题基准，覆盖 57 个学科约 14000 道题。

## 应用

通常作为大模型通用知识水平的第一参考指标。

## 局限

题目泄漏风险高，社区已推出 MMLU-Pro 等更新版本。
creates.oneLiner: 覆盖 57 个学科的跨学科选择题基准。

sources.quote: MMLU 全称 Massive Multitask Language Understanding，由 Hendrycks 等人于 2020 年提出

creates.title: HumanEval
creates.body: HumanEval 是 OpenAI 于 2021 年提出的 164 道手写 Python 编程题基准，评估指标为 pass@k。Claude 3.5 Sonnet 在 pass@1 上突破 92%。
creates.oneLiner: OpenAI 提出的 164 道 Python 编程题基准。

sources.quote: HumanEval 由 OpenAI 于 2021 年提出，包含 164 道手写的 Python 编程题目

creates.title: LLM-as-Judge
creates.body:
LLM-as-Judge 是让能力更强的模型扮演评委对候选输出按 rubric 评分的范式。

## 优势

解决 BLEU/ROUGE 对语义改写不敏感的痛点，覆盖创意写作、对话连贯性等难量化维度。代表性框架 MT-Bench、AlpacaEval、Arena-Hard。

## 风险

位置偏见、长度偏见、自我偏好偏见，建议异家族评委或多评委集成投票。
creates.oneLiner: LLM-as-Judge 是一种让能力更强的模型 (如 GPT-4 或 Claude Opus) 扮演评委角色按指定 rubric 对候选输出给出胜负或评分的语义评估范式，它解决了 BLEU 与 ROUGE 对语义改写不敏感的核心痛点，能够覆盖创意写作、对话连贯性、安全合规、风格一致性等难以用传统自动指标量化的开放维度，但需要警惕位置偏见、长度偏见、家族偏好与自我偏好偏见，建议采用异家族评委或多评委集成投票以提高结果稳健性，并配合双盲交换位置、控制长度上限、屏蔽模型名等手段缓解偏差，这一点在工程实践与学术评估中都至关重要，是现代评估流程不可或缺的关...

sources.quote: LLM-as-Judge 是近年兴起的范式，让一个能力更强的模型扮演评委角色

{"creates":[{"slug":"rag","title":"Retrieval-Augmented Generation","category":"ENTITY","body":"Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pairs a generative language model with an external retrieval system so answers can be grounded in source documents the model never memorized.

## Origin

The pattern emerged from the 2020 paper by Lewis et al.

## Adoption

It is the dominant industrial recipe for question answering over private corpora and customer support.","oneLiner":"Architectural pattern pairing an LLM with external retrieval for grounded answers.","sources":[{"documentId":"doc-en-tech","spanStart":50,"spanEnd":400,"quote":"Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pairs a generative language model with an external retrieval system"}]},{"slug":"chunking","title":"Chunking","category":"CONCEPT","body":"Chunking is the process of slicing source documents into retrieval units, typically a few hundred tokens long. Poor chunking is the single largest source of bad retrieval results — chunks that span topic boundaries inject noise, while chunks that are too short fragment reasoning.","oneLiner":"Slicing source documents into retrieval units of a few hundred tokens.","sources":[{"documentId":"doc-en-tech","spanStart":700,"spanEnd":1100,"quote":"Chunking is the process of slicing source documents into retrieval units"}]},{"slug":"reranker","title":"Reranker","category":"ENTITY","body":"A Reranker is a cross-encoder model that scores each (query, candidate) pair jointly.

## Why use it

Produces a more accurate relevance signal than the bi-encoder used for first-stage retrieval.

## Common options

Cohere Rerank, BGE Reranker, Jina Reranker. Typically applied to the top 50–100 results.","oneLiner":"Cross-encoder that re-scores retrieval candidates for higher precision.","sources":[{"documentId":"doc-en-tech","spanStart":3000,"spanEnd":3300,"quote":"A Reranker is a cross-encoder model that scores each (query, candidate) pair jointly"}]}],"updates":[],"deletes":[]}

creates.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
creates.body:
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pairs a generative language model with an external retrieval system so answers can be grounded in source documents the model never memorized.

## Origin

The pattern emerged from the 2020 paper by Lewis et al.

## Adoption

It is the dominant industrial recipe for question answering over private corpora and customer support.
creates.oneLiner: Architectural pattern pairing an LLM with external retrieval for grounded answers.

sources.quote: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pairs a generative language model with an external retrieval system

creates.title: Chunking
creates.body: Chunking is the process of slicing source documents into retrieval units, typically a few hundred tokens long. Poor chunking is the single largest source of bad retrieval results — chunks that span topic boundaries inject noise, while chunks that are too short fragment reasoning.
creates.oneLiner: Slicing source documents into retrieval units of a few hundred tokens.

sources.quote: Chunking is the process of slicing source documents into retrieval units

creates.title: Reranker
creates.body:
A Reranker is a cross-encoder model that scores each (query, candidate) pair jointly.

## Why use it

Produces a more accurate relevance signal than the bi-encoder used for first-stage retrieval.

## Common options

Cohere Rerank, BGE Reranker, Jina Reranker. Typically applied to the top 50–100 results.
creates.oneLiner: Cross-encoder that re-scores retrieval candidates for higher precision.

sources.quote: A Reranker is a cross-encoder model that scores each (query, candidate) pair jointly

## 与单轮问答的差异

单轮问答正在迅速让位给多步推理与工具调用的 Agent 系统。","oneLiner":"基于 LLM 的多步推理与工具调用系统。","sources":[{"documentId":"doc-mixed","spanStart":40,"spanEnd":260,"quote":"一个完整的 AI Agent 通常包含规划 (Planning)、工具调用 (Tool Use)、记忆 (Memory)、自我反思 (Reflection) 四类核心能力"}]},{"slug":"tool-use","title":"Tool Use","category":"CONCEPT","body":"Tool Use evaluates whether the agent picks the right tool, fills parameters correctly, and recovers gracefully from tool errors. 工具调用是 Agent 与真实世界交互的窗口，也是错误传播最严重的环节。","oneLiner":"Agent 选对工具、填对参数、并能从错误中恢复的能力。","sources":[{"documentId":"doc-mixed","spanStart":700,"spanEnd":1000,"quote":"Tool Use evaluates whether the agent picks the right tool, fills parameters correctly"}]},{"slug":"agentbench","title":"AgentBench","category":"ENTITY","body":"AgentBench 是 Liu 等人 2023 年提出的多环境 Agent 评估框架。

The unified interface across heterogeneous environments makes it the closest thing to a general agent leaderboard.","oneLiner":"覆盖 8 个交互环境的多环境 Agent 评估框架。","sources":[{"documentId":"doc-mixed","spanStart":2200,"spanEnd":2500,"quote":"AgentBench 是 Liu 等人 2023 年提出的多环境 Agent 评估框架"}]}],"updates":[],"deletes":[]}

creates.title: AI Agent
creates.body:
AI Agent 是基于大语言模型的多步推理与工具调用系统。

## 核心能力

规划 (Planning)、工具调用 (Tool Use)、记忆 (Memory)、自我反思 (Reflection) 四类。

## 与单轮问答的差异

单轮问答正在迅速让位给多步推理与工具调用的 Agent 系统。
creates.oneLiner: 基于 LLM 的多步推理与工具调用系统。

sources.quote: 一个完整的 AI Agent 通常包含规划 (Planning)、工具调用 (Tool Use)、记忆 (Memory)、自我反思 (Reflection) 四类核心能力

creates.title: Tool Use
creates.body: Tool Use evaluates whether the agent picks the right tool, fills parameters correctly, and recovers gracefully from tool errors. 工具调用是 Agent 与真实世界交互的窗口，也是错误传播最严重的环节。
creates.oneLiner: Agent 选对工具、填对参数、并能从错误中恢复的能力。

sources.quote: Tool Use evaluates whether the agent picks the right tool, fills parameters correctly

creates.title: AgentBench
creates.body:
AgentBench 是 Liu 等人 2023 年提出的多环境 Agent 评估框架。

## 覆盖环境

操作系统、数据库、知识图谱、卡牌游戏、网购、家居模拟等八个交互环境。

## 贡献

The unified interface across heterogeneous environments makes it the closest thing to a general agent leaderboard.
creates.oneLiner: 覆盖 8 个交互环境的多环境 Agent 评估框架。

sources.quote: AgentBench 是 Liu 等人 2023 年提出的多环境 Agent 评估框架
